---
title: "Dermo"
output: html_document
---

# Perform basic analyses, output figures and tables for Dermo data

``` {r BasicStats}

### Stats for Dermo Prevalence
# Dermo prevalence by section
DermoStats <- Dermo %>%
  mutate(DermoInfected = ifelse(DermoMantle > 0 | DermoGill > 0, 1, 0),
         DermoIntensity = (DermoMantle + DermoGill) / 2,
         AnalysisDate = as.Date(floor_date(TripDate, unit = "month")),
         Plot_Date = as.Date(AnalysisDate + 14)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DermoInfected)) %>% # Remove null records
  group_by(AnalysisDate, Plot_Date, Estuary, SectionName) %>% 
  summarise(n_DermoTotal = n(),
    n_DermoInfected = sum(DermoInfected, na.rm = TRUE),
    DermoInfected_mean = (n_DermoInfected / n_DermoTotal) * 100,
    DermoInfected_se = sqrt((DermoInfected_mean / 100) * (1 - (DermoInfected_mean / 100)) / n_DermoTotal),
    DermoInfected_ci_lower = (DermoInfected_mean / 100 - 1.96 * DermoInfected_se) * 100,
    DermoInfected_ci_upper = (DermoInfected_mean / 100 + 1.96 * DermoInfected_se) * 100,
   # #  
    n_DermoIntensity = sum(DermoIntensity, na.rm = TRUE),
    DermoIntensity_mean = (n_DermoIntensity / n_DermoInfected),
    DermoIntensity_se = std.error(DermoIntensity),
    DermoIntensity_ci_lower = (DermoIntensity_mean - DermoIntensity_se),
    DermoIntensity_ci_upper = (DermoIntensity_mean + DermoIntensity_se),
    .groups = "drop")
  

# Median values
DermoStatsMedian <- DermoStats %>%
  filter(AnalysisDate < ReportStart) %>%
  group_by(SectionName) %>%
  summarise(DermoPMedian = median(DermoInfected_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
            DermoPMax = max(DermoInfected_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
            DermoIMedian = median(DermoIntensity_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
            DermoIMax = max(DermoIntensity_mean, na.rm = TRUE))

```

``` {r Dermo Prevalence Figures}

### Function explanation
# generate_plot(df, 
#               x_variable, x_label, 
#               y_variable, y_label, y_SD, 
#               UseColor, UseFill, 
#               title)

# Stats for Dermo Prevalence by Year and Section
DermoPrevalenceStats_Section_fig <- generate_grouped_plot(DermoStats, 
                                                "Plot_Date", "Date", 
                                                "DermoInfected_mean", "Dermo Prevalence (%)", "DermoIntensity_se", 
                                                "SectionName", "SectionName", 
                                                "AB Oyster Dermo Prevalence by Year and Section")
print(DermoPrevalenceStats_Section_fig)

```

``` {r Dermo Intensity Figures}

### Function explanation
# generate_plot(df, 
#               x_variable, x_label, 
#               y_variable, y_label, y_SD, 
#               UseColor, UseFill, 
#               title)

# Stats for Dermo Intensity by Year and Section
DermoIntensityStats_Section_fig <- generate_grouped_plot(DermoStats, 
                                                "Plot_Date", "Date", 
                                                "DermoIntensity_mean", "Mean Dermo Intensity (Mackin scale)", "DermoInfected_se", 
                                                "SectionName", "SectionName", 
                                                "AB Oyster Dermo Intensity by Year and Section")
print(DermoIntensityStats_Section_fig)

```

``` {Dermo Text}
### Placeholder for Dermo text for report
```
This is text to output for Dermo
